custom_fields.name: Cost center
custom_fields.help_text: Internal cost-allocation tag, used by Finance for monthly chargeback.

custom_fields.name: Equipment model
custom_fields.help_text: Specify the affected device. Required on hardware tickets.

custom_fields.name: Charge to project
custom_fields.help_text: Optional. Project code if this is a billable activity.

custom_fields.name: Approver
custom_fields.help_text: Service-request approver. Defaults to the requester's manager.

custom_fields.name: Renewal date
custom_fields.help_text: When this KB article should be reviewed for accuracy.

custom_fields.name: Vendor
custom_fields.help_text: Hardware manufacturer. Used by procurement for warranty lookups.

custom_fields.name: Sensitive data?
custom_fields.help_text: Flag if the ticket may contain regulated data (PII, PHI, financial).

custom_fields.name: Resolution category
custom_fields.help_text: Set on resolution; powers the monthly category-breakdown report.
